tool:delegate-task.description: Delegate a task to a specialist agent via DelegationManager (WaiterModel dispatch, dual-signal completion)

tool:delegation-status.description: Poll delegation status or retrieve completed results by ID or status filter

tool:run-background-command.description: Run CLI commands in shared background PTY sessions with queue-governed dispatch (requires bun-pty)

tool:prompt-skim.description: Fast scan of prompt content: count words/lines/tokens, extract URLs, verify file paths

tool:prompt-analyze.description: Analyze prompt content for contradictions, vagueness, missing scope, and clarity signals

tool:session-patch.description: Patch specific sections in session file with backup

hook:event.description: Routes SDK events to lifecycle manager, drives session compaction and delegation event observation

hook:messages.transform.description: Scans message history for prompt-enhance triggers and injects context packets

hook:experimental.session.compacting.description: Session compaction hook that preserves harness metadata across context compaction

hook:tool.execute.before.description: Circuit breaker check and tool budget tracking before tool execution

hook:tool.execute.after.description: Post-execution stats tracking and harness metadata injection into tool outputs
